title: Washington wants to sanction Chinese AI for ‘theft’. Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says that’s backwards.
summary: Nvidia’s Jensen Huang, speaking to Axios at a new chip plant in Texas, called that panic misplaced. “These Chinese models are excellent,” he said. “Open-source models that are excellent should be used.” American firms, he argued, should “absolutely” be allowed to run…
